behavior_summary: This script implements the NPC 'Bane' behavior: combat casting entry, theft response, conversation/dialogue, scheduled movement, and fast-area item cleanup.
U8P_BANE::cast marks the NPC aggressive (sets baneMad) and enters a combat-spell AI loop (SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop).

U8P_BANE::AvatarStoleSomething enforces owner/privilege checks (baneJoined, sponsorTest, keyOfTheAcolyte), issues incremental warnings (tracking baneWarned) or immediately escalates to hostile action (stasis, setTarget, barks).

U8P_BANE::use begins player interaction: starts a conversation, inspects actor/flags, and routes into dialogue/scene handlers (U8P_BANE::func0782, U8P_BANE::func5614 or external scene helpers) before ending the conversation.
U8P_BANE::func0782 is the main menu-driven dialog: builds a dynamic menu, presents Ask to the player, captures choices (suspendAssign) and dispatches to many topic barks and helper subroutines.
U8P_BANE::schedule controls periodic movement/routing based on world flags (inDaemonScene, acolyteKilled, goToInnerSanctum) and calls movement helpers to initiate/complete routes.

U8P_BANE::enterFastArea/U8P_BANE::leaveFastArea handle fast-update area entry/exit: item coordinate checks, item destruction or frame updates (when acolyteKilled), possible teleport/movement triggers, and cleanup of engine references.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BANE::cast: set flag baneMad then call SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop and suspend — simple, high-confidence linear entry to combat behavior.

U8P_BANE::AvatarStoleSomething: privileging check (baneJoined/sponsorTest/keyOfTheAcolyte) -> if privileged: early return/ignore; else call resetRef/METHOD::func091C and either (a) special-case immediate hostile stasis/target if stolen reference matches a protected local, or (b) issue incremental warnings by incrementing baneWarned, or (c) on final escalation stasis + setTarget + call U8P_BANE::func050A.

U8P_BANE::use: if this NPC is dead skip; otherwise BeginConversation -> suspend -> inspect actor at stack slot then select one of several dialog/scene routes depending on baneMad, baneJoined, keyOfTheAcolyte, acolyteKilled, or actor-dead state.

U8P_BANE::func0782 (dialogue loop): build menu (local3) from static options and global-flag-driven options, append 'Farewell.' with FREE::moveToEndOfList, Ask -> suspend & capture choice (local2/local5), strcmp-driven branching to many lines or subcalls, loop until 'Farewell.' chosen.

U8P_BANE::schedule: early exit if Npc::isDead(this) or inDaemonScene; choose route constants by acolyteKilled/goToInnerSanctum flags, call METHOD::func143A, suspend, if process_result() true call METHOD::func133F.
open_questions: What exact entity/meaning does the U8P_BANE::cast parameter (uword param1) carry for U8P_BANE::cast? The process receives a param but does not U8P_BANE::use it in the visible body.
Is BANE::func050A an internal helper in the same script with side-effects beyond those inferred (it is called but not listed as a top-level function here)?
Exact semantics and numeric meanings of the route/coordinate constants used by U8P_BANE::schedule (local2/local1/local0) are inferred but not fully known.

Precise conditions under which U8P_BANE::enterFastArea destroys specific items (coordinate thresholds and which items are targeted) are only inferred from Item::getX comparisons; the exact threshold logic is unclear.

main_function.name: U8P_BANE::cast
main_function.purpose: Mark the NPC as aggressive (baneMad) and start the combat spell-casting AI loop.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the NPC begins a casting/combat-spell action (engine calls this process to start spell behavior).
Receives a uword parameter but the visible body only sets the 'baneMad' flag and calls the external spell-loop routine.

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::cast
function_map.role: Combat spell-entry: set aggressive state and enter spell AI loop

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: Theft response: privilege checks, warnings escalation, and immediate hostile reaction

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::look
function_map.role: Look/short-description provider; selects among name/job/dead variants

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::schedule
function_map.role: Scheduled movement/routing controller based on world flags

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler: item cleanup, frame changes, teleport/movement triggers

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::use
function_map.role: Player-U8P_BANE::use interaction entry: begin conversation and route to dialog/scene handlers

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::func0782
function_map.role: Main dialogue routine: menu-driven conversation and branching topics

function_map.name: U8P_BANE::func5614
function_map.role: Short monologue/yes-no petition flow (acolyte petition behavior)

internal_calls.purpose: Default main dialogue branch (menu-driven conversation) when player interacts and no special scene flags override
Alternate monologue branch used when inspected actor is dead (shorter interaction)
Cleanup/follow-up after escalated theft response (appears to be an internal Bane helper called on escalation)

external_calls.purpose: Start/run the combat spell-casting AI loop for this NPC
Theft-handling side-effects/notification called during non-privileged theft branch
Reset an engine reference slot as part of theft handling
Set NPC's combat/attention target to the Avatar when escalating to hostile action
Temporarily freeze/unfreeze Avatar as part of a dramatic hostile reaction
Initiate/queue movement/route using computed route/coordinate parameters
Follow-up call executed when movement completes (process_result true)
Low-level movement/routing invoked during fast-area entry under certain flag conditions
Query item X coordinate for conditional destruction/cleanup
Remove targeted item objects during fast-area entry cleanup
Change item appearance/state when acolyteKilled flag is set
Conversation/scene helper executed when the inspected actor is alive (first U8P_BANE::use branch)
Conversation/behavior helper used when 'baneMad' is set
Conversation/scene helper used when 'baneJoined' is set (joined/faction branch)
Scene helper called when 'keyOfTheAcolyte' is set
Scene helper called when 'acolyteKilled' is set
Append 'Farewell.' exit option to the dialogue menu (local3)
Subdialogue/scene helper invoked from certain menu branches
Another subdialogue/scene helper invoked from menu branches
Apply or finalize state changes for the petition monologue (called before and after the yes/no prompt)
Spawn/present a yes/no prompt to player and capture the result
Reset an engine reference (cleanup) when leaving the fast-update area

reads.name: baneJoined
reads.likely_effect: Used to exempt/alter responses (theft handling and dialogue branches for joined NPC state)

reads.name: sponsorTest
reads.likely_effect: Part of privilege checks for theft handling and movement conditions

reads.name: keyOfTheAcolyte
reads.likely_effect: Selects key-related scene/dialog branches and factors into movement/privilege checks

reads.name: baneName
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether name-based text appears in U8P_BANE::look() and whether Truename dialog is offered

reads.name: baneJob
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether job/title text appears in U8P_BANE::look() and whether certain dialog options are included

reads.name: acolyteKilled
reads.likely_effect: Alters U8P_BANE::schedule and U8P_BANE::enterFastArea behavior (different routing, item frame changes, scene triggers)

reads.name: goToInnerSanctum
reads.likely_effect: Used with acolyteKilled to choose teleport/movement to inner sanctum

reads.name: inDaemonScene
reads.likely_effect: Suppresses scheduled movement and some movement/cleanup calls while inside the daemon scene

reads.name: avatarMasterSorcerer
reads.likely_effect: When true triggers Npc::setTarget in U8P_BANE::enterFastArea (direct attention/aggression)

reads.name: baneHasAsked
reads.likely_effect: Dialogue state used in U8P_BANE::func0782 to vary initial menu options (first-time vs subsequent)

reads.name: baneGroveled
reads.likely_effect: Tracks whether the petition (U8P_BANE::func5614) has already been presented/answered; gates repeat prompt

writes.name: baneMad
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_BANE::cast to mark the NPC as in aggressive/mad state before combat AI starts

writes.name: baneWarned
writes.likely_effect: Incremented by U8P_BANE::AvatarStoleSomething to track warnings given to the Avatar before escalation

writes.name: baneGroveled
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_BANE::func5614 after the petition flow to record that the petition occurred

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the NPC 'Bane' behavior: combat casting entry, theft response, conversation/dialogue, scheduled movement, and fast-area item cleanup.
